name: Stay Crisp Banana Fritters
recipeIngredient: cooking oil or melted shortening (for frying)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together 1 cup flour, baking powder, salt and sugar.
2. Combine egg and milk, 2 tablespoons shortening or oil.
3. Add to dry ingredients; mix well to make batter.
4. If bananas are large, cut in pieces; roll in the 1/4 cup flour then coat completely in batter.
5. Fry in hot, deep fat (375 degrees) for 4 to 6 minutes, turning the fritters to brown evenly.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Serve hot.
